content_body:
The Forsyth County Hookers – We are a group of rug hookers mostly from GA that meet a few times each month. But a group of us decided to have a Hookers Retreat in the mountains. You have no idea the fun and jocularity that went on here this week! Not only was Fallen Timber exceptional, but the friendships and camaraderie that took place here was absolutely great. Although it rained for one complete day, we just sat in the living room with a fire going, talking, laughing, and hooking. We have already decided to continue this “tradition” and have another retreat in the spring. All of us truly had a wonderful time – enjoying each other as well as the craft that we are hoping will continue long after we are all gone. People should always remember how things were done in the past! Thank you.
The Hookers of GA!
title: North Georgia Mountain Girls' Retreat
